recordName: Youngest driver to debut in F1
description: Arrived at the 2015 Australian Grand Prix aged just 17 years and 166 days.
Qualified 6th at the Malaysian Grand Prix just two weeks after his debut.
Finished 7th at the Sepang circuit for 17 years and 180 days on the clock.
Took victory at the 2016 Spanish Grand Prix aged 18 years, 228 days.

recordName: Youngest driver on an F1 podium
description: Finished on the maiden podium following his 2016 Spain victory.

recordName: Youngest driver with a grand slam
description: Pole, fastest lap, every lap led, race win — the 2021 Austrian Grand Prix at 23 yrs, 277 days.

recordName: Most overtakes in a single season
description: Pulled off 78 overtakes during the 2016 campaign.

recordName: Most podiums in a single season
description: Reached the podium 21 times from 22 races in 2023, surpassing his own 18 in 2022.

recordName: Most wins in a single season
description: Won 19 of 22 races in 2023 — past Vettel and Schumacher's mark of 13.

recordName: Most points in a single season
description: Scored 575 points in 2023, beating his own 454-point 2022 season.
Won 10 races back-to-back, surpassing Sebastian Vettel's record of 9.
Converted 13 straight poles into wins, eclipsing Michael Schumacher's record of 12.
Has scored from 1,030 consecutive races, passing Lewis Hamilton's 1,008. Active tally.

recordName: First Dutchman with a pole position
description: Scored maiden pole in July 2019 at the Hungaroring in the RB15.
Crowned world champion in 2021. Only one Dutch champion in F1 history.
Tied Alain Prost and Sebastian Vettel with four championships.
Reached the 100-podium milestone at the 2024 Saudi Arabian Grand Prix.
Tied with Alonso and Prost on 106 — fourth on the all-time list.
Reached 200 starts at the 2024 Dutch Grand Prix in Zandvoort.
Passed Ayrton Senna in lap-leader rankings during the 2024 Japanese Grand Prix.

recordName: Highest win percentage on the grid
description: Win rate of 30.73%, surpassing Lewis Hamilton's 30.38%.
Renews at the highest indexed rate: €963,800 (2023); ~€1,200,000 (2024).
